name: @wuphf/desktop
description: WUPHF v1 desktop shell — Electron main + preload + minimal renderer. Sandboxed renderer, contextBridge typed allowlist (OS verbs only), utilityProcess.fork() broker spawning. No app-data IPC; the renderer reaches the broker over loopback HTTP/SSE in a later branch.

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.main.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.preload.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.renderer.json
